zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Banastre於1241年出生在英國英格蘭爾切斯特時，他的父親Robert de Banastre IV25歲，母親Clemence de Orreby20歲。他於1259年與Alice Woodcock在英國藍卡爾牛頓 在 馬可費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1291年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾爾登享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Banastre was born in 1241, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Banastre IV, was 25 and his mother, Clemence de Orreby, was 20. He married Alice Woodcock in 1259, in Newton in Makerfield, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1291, in Cuerden, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Banastre est né en 1241, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Banastre IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Clemence de Orreby, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Woodcock en 1259, à Newton in Makerfield, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1291, à Cuerden, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Er hat 1259 in Newton in Makerfield, Lancashire, England Alice Woodcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Banastreが1241年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Robert de Banastre IVは25歳，母Clemence de Orrebyは20歳であった。1259年にイギリスランカシュアイアニュートン イン マケルフィールドでAlice Woodcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1291年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクウエルデンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Banastre(이)가 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Banastre IV(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Clemence de Orreby(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1259년 영국 랭카실르 뉴턴 인 마커필드에서 Alice Woodcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1291년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 쿠르든에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Banastre родился в 1241 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Banastre IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemence de Orreby, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Woodcock в 1259 г. в местности нютон ин меикирфиелд, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1291 г. в местности куирден, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
